title: test_landing_page_accessibility
description: Verify that the landing page at / loads correctly without authentication and displays the hero section and features overview.

title: test_onboarding_profile_setup_validation
description: Verify that the onboarding page at /onboarding requires authentication and enforces validation for required fields such as display name and role before allowing profile submission.

title: test_realtime_discovery_feed_post_filtering
description: Verify that the /chat page displays the real-time discovery feed, allows filtering posts by user, and enables starting a direct chat from a post.

title: test_instant_messaging_send_text_and_media
description: Verify that users can send text messages and media attachments in direct or group chats on the /chat page, and that message delivery status is updated accordingly.

title: test_status_updates_viewing
description: Verify that users can view the list of temporary status updates on the /chat page and open a specific status to see full content and author details.

title: test_challenges_arena_active_challenges_listing
description: Verify that users can enter the challenges room from /chat, view the list of active coding or technical challenges, and open a challenge to see its details.
